title: Jack Dorsey Takes On Slack and GitHub With New AI Workplace Platform 'Buzz' - Slashdot
excerpt: Jack Dorsey's Block has launched Buzz, an open-source workplace collaboration platform that combines messaging, project management, and software development workflows for teams of both humans and AI agents. Dorsey described Buzz as "a new groupchat platform for teams of people and agents of all size...
content_html:
Jack Dorsey's Block has launched Buzz, an open-source workplace collaboration platform that combines messaging, project management, and software development workflows for teams of both humans and AI agents. Dorsey described Buzz as "a new groupchat platform for teams of people and agents of all sizes" that is "model-agnostic, decentralized, self-sovereign and open source." SmartCompany reports: According to the Buzz website, users can invite specialized AI agents into team chats, allowing them to collaborate with employees and even other AI agents. From there, they can reportedly move directly from discussions into planning, coding, pull requests and project management without switching between multiple applications.

Buzz also aims to replace parts of GitHub by bringing software development workflows directly into the platform. Teams can plan work, write code, review pull requests and manage Git projects without jumping between separate collaboration and development tools. [...] In practice, that means businesses aren't locked into a single AI provider. Organisations can self-host Buzz, customize it to suit their own workflows and choose whichever AI models best fit their needs.

Dorsey described Buzz as "a new groupchat platform for teams of people and agents of all sizes" that is "model-agnostic, decentralized, self-sovereign and open source." SmartCompany reports: According to the Buzz website, users can invite specialized AI agents into team chats, allowing them to collaborate with employees and even other AI agents. From there, they can reportedly move directly from discussions into planning, coding, pull requests and project management without switching between multiple applications. Buzz also aims to replace parts of GitHub by bringing software development workflows directly into the platform. Teams can plan work, write code, review pull requests and manage Git projects without jumping between separate collaboration and development tools. [...] In practice, that means businesses aren't locked into a single AI provider. Organisations can self-host Buzz, customize it to suit their own workflows and choose whichever AI models best fit their needs.

blocks.html_en:
Jack Dorsey's Block has launched Buzz, an open-source workplace collaboration platform that combines messaging, project management, and software development workflows for teams of both humans and AI agents. Dorsey described Buzz as "a new groupchat platform for teams of people and agents of all sizes" that is "model-agnostic, decentralized, self-sovereign and open source." SmartCompany reports: According to the Buzz website, users can invite specialized AI agents into team chats, allowing them to collaborate with employees and even other AI agents. From there, they can reportedly move directly from discussions into planning, coding, pull requests and project management without switching between multiple applications.

Buzz also aims to replace parts of GitHub by bringing software development workflows directly into the platform. Teams can plan work, write code, review pull requests and manage Git projects without jumping between separate collaboration and development tools. [...] In practice, that means businesses aren't locked into a single AI provider. Organisations can self-host Buzz, customize it to suit their own workflows and choose whichever AI models best fit their needs.

sentences.en: Jack Dorsey's Block has launched Buzz, an open-source workplace collaboration platform that combines messaging, project management, and software development workflows for teams of both humans and AI agents.
sentences.zh: Jack Dorsey 的 Block 推出了 Buzz，这是一个开源工作场所协作平台，为人类和人工智能代理团队结合了消息传递、项目管理和软件开发工作流程。

sentences.en: Dorsey described Buzz as "a new groupchat platform for teams of people and agents of all sizes" that is "model-agnostic, decentralized, self-sovereign and open source."
sentences.zh: Dorsey 将 Buzz 描述为“一个适合各种规模的人员和代理团队的新群聊平台”，该平台“与模型无关、去中心化、自主主权和开源”。

sentences.en: SmartCompany reports: According to the Buzz website, users can invite specialized AI agents into team chats, allowing them to collaborate with employees and even other AI agents.
sentences.zh: SmartCompany 报道：根据 Buzz 网站，用户可以邀请专门的人工智能代理加入团队聊天，使他们能够与员工甚至其他人工智能代理进行协作。

sentences.en: From there, they can reportedly move directly from discussions into planning, coding, pull requests and project management without switching between multiple applications.
sentences.zh: 据报道，他们可以从那里直接从讨论转向规划、编码、拉取请求和项目管理，而无需在多个应用程序之间切换。

sentences.en: Buzz also aims to replace parts of GitHub by bringing software development workflows directly into the platform.
sentences.zh: Buzz 还旨在通过将软件开发工作流程直接引入平台来取代 GitHub 的部分内容。

sentences.en: Teams can plan work, write code, review pull requests and manage Git projects without jumping between separate collaboration and development tools. [...]
sentences.zh: 团队可以规划工作、编写代码、审查拉取请求和管理 Git 项目，而无需在单独的协作和开发工具之间切换。 [...]

sentences.en: In practice, that means businesses aren't locked into a single AI provider.
sentences.zh: 实际上，这意味着企业不会被单一的人工智能提供商所束缚。

sentences.en: Organisations can self-host Buzz, customize it to suit their own workflows and choose whichever AI models best fit their needs.
sentences.zh: 组织可以自行托管 Buzz，对其进行自定义以适合自己的工作流程，并选择最适合其需求的 AI 模型。

blocks.html_en: Buzz also aims to replace parts of GitHub by bringing software development workflows directly into the platform. Teams can plan work, write code, review pull requests and manage Git projects without jumping between separate collaboration and development tools. [...] In practice, that means businesses aren't locked into a single AI provider. Organisations can self-host Buzz, customize it to suit their own workflows and choose whichever AI models best fit their needs.

sentences.en: Buzz also aims to replace parts of GitHub by bringing software development workflows directly into the platform.
sentences.zh: Buzz 还旨在通过将软件开发工作流程直接引入平台来取代 GitHub 的部分内容。

sentences.en: Teams can plan work, write code, review pull requests and manage Git projects without jumping between separate collaboration and development tools. [...]
sentences.zh: 团队可以规划工作、编写代码、审查拉取请求和管理 Git 项目，而无需在单独的协作和开发工具之间切换。 [...]

sentences.en: In practice, that means businesses aren't locked into a single AI provider.
sentences.zh: 实际上，这意味着企业不会被单一的人工智能提供商所束缚。

sentences.en: Organisations can self-host Buzz, customize it to suit their own workflows and choose whichever AI models best fit their needs.
sentences.zh: 组织可以自行托管 Buzz，对其进行自定义以适合自己的工作流程，并选择最适合其需求的 AI 模型。

content_html_zh: Jack Dorsey 的 Block 推出了 Buzz，这是一个开源工作场所协作平台，为人类和人工智能代理团队结合了消息传递、项目管理和软件开发工作流程。 Dorsey 将 Buzz 描述为“一个适合各种规模的人员和代理团队的新群聊平台”，该平台“与模型无关、去中心化、自主主权和开源”。 SmartCompany 报道：根据 Buzz 网站，用户可以邀请专门的人工智能代理加入团队聊天，使他们能够与员工甚至其他人工智能代理进行协作。 据报道，他们可以从那里直接从讨论转向规划、编码、拉取请求和项目管理，而无需在多个应用程序之间切换。 Buzz 还旨在通过将软件开发工作流程直接引入平台来取代 GitHub 的部分内容。 团队可以规划工作、编写代码、审查拉取请求和管理 Git 项目，而无需在单独的协作和开发工具之间切换。 [...] 实际上，这意味着企业不会被单一的人工智能提供商所束缚。 组织可以自行托管 Buzz，对其进行自定义以适合自己的工作流程，并选择最适合其需求的 AI 模型。
